refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall provide a comprehensive worksite area analysis including terrain mapping, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation.
refined_fr.rationale: Decomposing the broad worksite mapping requirement into specific sub-functions ensures clarity and targeted design solutions for each critical aspect of the worksite model.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify each sub-function by validating the accuracy and completeness of terrain maps, obstacle identification, and work-zone boundaries against ground truth data or sensor inputs.
sub_frs: FR1: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent designated work-zones within the worksite.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle data acquisition.
DP2: Implement a geospatial data processing algorithm to generate terrain and obstacle maps.
DP3: Use a GIS-based work-zone modeling framework to represent work-zone boundaries.
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrate LIDAR and camera sensor fusion with geospatial data processing and GIS-based work-zone modeling to generate a comprehensive worksite model.

potential_sources: Data dependencies between terrain mapping and obstacle detection algorithms.
Shared data structures for spatial representation.
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP integrates sensor data and geospatial processing in a modular manner, minimizing tight coupling and enabling independent updates.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of high-fidelity LIDAR and camera sensors.
Risk of sensor data inaccuracies affecting model quality.
Computational complexity may impact real-time performance.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing sensor data acquisition and processing to isolate sensor-specific risks and enable easier upgrades.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for integrating sensor data, processing worksite models, and providing outputs to planning and execution functions.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data streams (LIDAR, camera) for processing.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Provides processed worksite model data to planning and execution modules.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with remote modules and teleoperation systems.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as the worksite mapping is a core function of the NGHE Solution module with minimal diffusion.
Vehicle module interacts with sensor hardware but does not contain mapping logic.
Teleoperation module consumes mapping data but does not implement mapping.
Safety Services may use mapping data for alerts but does not implement mapping.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: The NGHE Solution module is the most appropriate boundary for implementing the worksite mapping DP due to its central role and high containment score.
containment_risks: Potential complexity growth within NGHE Solution if mapping logic is not well modularized.
Risk of interface overload if multiple consumers require frequent updates.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear internal submodules within NGHE Solution to manage mapping functions and interfaces to reduce complexity and diffusion.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are well decomposed and the selected DP logically addresses each sub-FR with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Potential diffusion of mapping logic if NGHE Solution module grows too large.
Interface management complexity with multiple external consumers.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor NGHE Solution as the implementation boundary, supporting architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by validating outputs at the NGHE Solution module interfaces using telemetry and tasking data.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of mapping functions to NGHE Solution with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Modularize NGHE Solution internally to manage complexity.
Establish interface update protocols to manage data diffusion.

decision.justification: The current decomposition and assignments are sound but require further detailed sub-FR decomposition and DP refinement to address sensor fusion and data processing specifics.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent designated work-zones within the worksite.

revise.why: To further decompose sub-functions for detailed design and verification planning.

assumptions: High-fidelity sensor data is available and reliable.
NGHE Solution module can be internally modularized.
open_risks: Sensor data inaccuracies impacting model quality.
evidence_needed: Preliminary internal module design of NGHE Solution.
